message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.
Iteration 1 — setting up the participant structure (pools/lanes) first.

I’ll now model the full end-to-end process across the Building Authority lanes, with message interactions to the Citizen and Environmental Agency, including the 14-day deadline and both final outcomes with citizen notification.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 10 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 2 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

I will fix the two critical message-flow semantics issues by expanding the Citizen into an explicit process that sends the application and (if requested) sends missing documents, so the Building Authority’s message start/catch events have proper senders.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…

I’ll resolve the critical abstraction mismatch by expanding the Environmental Agency pool and explicitly modeling its receive/review/respond steps, so the request/response message flows have concrete endpoints.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

I’ll fix the critical gap by ensuring every Building Authority final outcome notifies the Citizen. I’ll add a Citizen catch event for the decision and connect all four authority message end events to it, then connect to a Citizen end event ('Decision received').
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
